creator: pm@wideworks.net
text:
Tried installing various snapshots from releng4.freebsd.org, it works all the way until it asks if I would like to install linux compatibilities. Then it gives an error! something like "Can't find the repository from specified server."
This have been going on for over 2 months. I install lot's of FreeBSD for my biz and friends, and always want's to try to get the most recent, therefore trying to install from releng4.freebsd.org. However, I alwyas get this error, so I am forced to use 4.3-Stable which was released in April.
Hopefully, someone will look into this and make the appropriate changes.
Peace out,
Ponch
